title: SASC Advances 1,790 Military Nominations
description: Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 1,790 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air...
text:
Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 1,790 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marine Corps.
The nominations were reported immediately to the floor following the Committee’s action.
